metadata.name: prediction_market_vault
metadata.description: Solana/Anchor replacement for the EVM PredictionMarketVault

instructions.name: accept_authority_transfer
docs: Accept a pending authority transfer. Must be called by pending authority.

instructions.name: cancel_authority_transfer
docs: Cancel a pending authority transfer. Current authority only.

instructions.name: claim_winnings
docs: Claim winnings after market resolution.
Payout equals shares held for the winning outcome.
# Arguments
* `min_payout_minor` - Minimum acceptable payout (for safety)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (payout destination). User must already have an ATA.

accounts.name: market_vault_ata
docs: Market PDA's USDC ATA (payout source).

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close a position account and reclaim rent once empty.

instructions.name: collect_fees
docs: Collect accumulated fees from a resolved market.
Only the authority can call this. Withdraws the specified amount from the market vault
to the fee recipient ATA (typically a company treasury wallet).
This should only be called after all winners have claimed their winnings.

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: Fee recipient wallet (typically company treasury).

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: market_vault_ata
docs: Market PDA's USDC ATA (source of fees).

accounts.name: fee_recipient_ata
docs: Fee recipient's USDC ATA (destination).

instructions.name: create_market
docs: Create a market.
Throttled to MARKET_CREATION_LIMIT creations per MARKET_CREATION_WINDOW_SECONDS.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: @deprecated - LEGACY: This instruction was used for custodial deposits.
The new non-custodial flow (place_bet, sell_position, claim_winnings) transfers
USDC directly between user wallet ATAs and market vault ATAs.
Kept for backward compatibility but should not be used in new integrations.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (source of deposit).

accounts.name: vault_usdc_ata
docs: Config PDA's USDC ATA (vault destination).

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initialize the global config PDA. Can only be called once.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint to use for the program.

instructions.name: place_bet
docs: Place a bet (buy shares). Pricing is enforced off-chain; on-chain enforces bounds + custody.
# Arguments
* `outcome` - 1=YES, 2=NO
* `collateral_minor` - Amount of USDC to pay (in minor units, 6 decimals)
* `shares_minor` - Number of shares to receive (scaled by 1e6)
* `max_cost_minor` - Maximum acceptable cost (slippage protection)
* `deadline_ts` - Latest unix timestamp for the tx to be valid

accounts.name: quote_authority
docs: Off-chain pricing authority that must co-sign bet/sell.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (source of collateral).

accounts.name: market_vault_ata
docs: Market PDA's USDC ATA (vault destination).

instructions.name: refund_cancelled
docs: Refund positions when a market is cancelled (outcome = 3).
Payout equals total shares held (YES + NO) since both sides are refunded.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (payout destination). User must already have an ATA.

accounts.name: market_vault_ata
docs: Market PDA's USDC ATA (payout source).

instructions.name: resolve_market
docs: Resolve a market. Only the authority can call this.
# Arguments
* `outcome` - 1=YES, 2=NO, 3=cancelled

instructions.name: sell_position
docs: Sell a position (cash out shares). Payout is enforced off-chain by requiring quote authority to co-sign.
# Arguments
* `outcome` - 1=YES, 2=NO (which shares to sell)
* `shares_minor` - Number of shares to sell (scaled by 1e6)
* `payout_minor` - Amount of USDC to receive (in minor units)
* `min_payout_minor` - Minimum acceptable payout (slippage protection)
* `deadline_ts` - Latest unix timestamp for the tx to be valid

accounts.name: quote_authority
docs: Off-chain pricing authority that must co-sign bet/sell.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (payout destination). User must already have an ATA.

accounts.name: market_vault_ata
docs: Market PDA's USDC ATA (payout source).

instructions.name: set_pending_authority
docs: Initiate a two-step authority transfer for the config.

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: @deprecated - LEGACY: This instruction was used for custodial withdrawals.
The new non-custodial flow (place_bet, sell_position, claim_winnings) transfers
USDC directly between user wallet ATAs and market vault ATAs.
Kept for backward compatibility but should not be used in new integrations.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - validated against config.

accounts.name: user_usdc_ata
docs: User's USDC ATA (withdraw destination).

accounts.name: vault_usdc_ata
docs: Config PDA's USDC ATA (vault source).

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority to accept ownership.

fields.name: requested_at_ts
docs: Unix timestamp when transfer was initiated.

fields.name: outcome
docs: 1=YES, 2=NO

fields.name: authority
docs: Program upgrade/admin authority.

fields.name: quote_authority
docs: Off-chain quote/bet authority (backend) that co-signs bet/sell txs.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: Configured USDC mint (devnet: custom mint, mainnet: official).

types.name: Deposited
docs: @deprecated - LEGACY: Event for custodial deposits (no longer used)

fields.name: uuid
docs: 16 raw UUID bytes from Supabase market id.

fields.name: outcome
docs: 0=open/unresolved, 1=YES, 2=NO, 3=cancelled

fields.name: q_yes
docs: Total YES shares (scaled by 1e6)

fields.name: q_no
docs: Total NO shares (scaled by 1e6)

fields.name: b
docs: Liquidity parameter b (scaled by 1e6)

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Total winnings claimed (in minor units)

fields.name: outcome
docs: 1=YES, 2=NO, 3=cancelled

fields.name: outcome
docs: 1=YES, 2=NO

fields.name: last_created_ts
docs: Packed rolling-window state:
- 0 => never created
- >0 => legacy format (single timestamp, pre-upgrade)
- <0 => -(window_start_ts * 10 + created_count)

types.name: UserVault
docs: @deprecated - LEGACY: This account was used for custodial deposits.
The new non-custodial flow transfers USDC directly to market vault ATAs.
Kept for backward compatibility but should not be used in new code.

fields.name: balance
docs: Internal vault balance in minor units (USDC has 6 decimals).

fields.name: outcome
docs: 1=YES, 2=NO

types.name: Withdrawn
docs: @deprecated - LEGACY: Event for custodial withdrawals (no longer used)
